title: Rena's Cassettes
description: Replace all discs in Minecraft; with Cassettes!
body:
![Image showcasing various cassettes seen in this pack, replacing the main ones from vanilla Minecraft.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/GOSFdHhZ/images/1f8fbc62473313df46ec99f512a8e7991204c2f2.png)
# What is this pack?

This pack changes the textures and renames all music discs to cassettes! *(Including advancments, disc fragment, and joke discs)*. The redesigns also...hopefully ensure they are visually distinct from one another,, so there shouldnt be any more mixups! 

As this is a passion project; I plan on trying to support this pack as long as possible!! Also trying to cover as many MC versions as possible.

Along with working support for as many mods as possible~
> *Check the **"Mod Support"** section for what mods it currently can handle.*

Please note!; This pack *DOES NOT* affect the Jukebox. BUT, If you do want a pack that does change it to a Tapedeck... feel free to check out my other pack, **Rena's Tapedeck** [[Modrinth↗]](https://modrinth.com/project/a7dBrHBX)

*aaannndd...*
Please check out **Lad's Cassettes** [[Modrinth↗]](https://modrinth.com/project/K6BM5tRC) by *Lad_Flaver*! (The textures are lovely!, and are a great option if you dont really like the look of my pack) 

## Pack Features

- Renames all music discs to *"Cassettes Tapes"*
  - [Refer to the **"Languages Section"** at the bottom, for currently supported languages]
- Emissive textures if you're using [*Continuity↗*](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) or alternative mods that use the Optifine emissive..system?

### *Mod Support*
- **Gipples Galore** [[Modrinth↗]](https://modrinth.com/project/QYfKDJOV)
- **Vista** [[Modrinth↗]](https://modrinth.com/project/zuARv1N7)

### *Languages*
- English (All variants other than Pirate and Cat)
- Français (Both Québécois and French)
- Español (España, Mexicano)
- Portuguese (Brazilian)

### *Credits*
- *Waradu* & *lost_my_marbles*
  - Makers of **Celeste Music Discs** [[Modrinth↗]](https://modrinth.com/project/63tX1sqa)[[PlanetMC↗]](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/music-cassettes-celeste/), the pack that inspired this one!
- My friend, *Blooky*
  -  Translating the pack's items to **Brazilian Portuguese**!
